summary: Completed regression testing for Aurora/Agent Forge app. All targeted features verified working: 1) Video generation API returns non-empty video_base64 - PASS (Grok API polling with multiple response structure handling works correctly), 2) Grid menu icon visible and clickable on main chat screen - PASS, 3) Main chat input/send area visible in mobile viewport (390x844) - PASS (bottom at 825px), 4) Agent chat input/send area visible in mobile viewport - PASS (bottom at 830px)

issues: shadow* style props deprecated - use boxShadow
textShadow* style props deprecated - use textShadow

critical_code_review_comments: Video generation endpoint correctly handles multiple Grok response structures including status=done with nested video.url
Backend logs show successful polling: request_id -> poll with 202 -> final 200 with status:done -> video URL extraction -> base64 encoding
KeyboardAvoidingView implementation with safe-area offsets working correctly on both main chat and agent chat screens
Mobile viewport (390x844) shows input areas fully visible at y~775-830

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Grid menu, main chat input, agent chat input all visible and functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: All regression checks passed. Video generation API properly extracts video URL from Grok response with structure {status: 'done', video: {url: '...'}} and converts to base64. KeyboardAvoidingView spacing fixed - input areas visible in 390x844 mobile viewport with bottom offsets. Grid menu at position x~326 opens Features modal with all sections.

features_verified.POST /api/generate-video: PASS - Returns 200 with non-empty video_base64 (regression for 'no data returned' bug)
features_verified.Video validation: PASS - Rejects invalid resolution (400) and invalid duration (400)
features_verified.Grid menu button visibility: PASS - Icon visible at top right, clickable, opens Features modal
features_verified.Main chat input in mobile viewport: PASS - Input at y=775, bottom at 825px within 844px viewport
features_verified.Agent chat input in mobile viewport: PASS - Input bottom at 830px within 844px viewport

backend_video_generation_logs.request_flow: POST -> request_id received -> polling (202=processing, 200=check status) -> status:done -> extract video.url -> download -> base64 encode
